figures.caption: Figure 1. (A) BlackBird microscopic imaging of grapevine leaf discs to quantify leaf hair and trichome density; (B) Leaf discs of diverse grape accessions showing phenotypic variability for leaf hair and trichome density.
Table 1. Comparison of prediction performance for leaf hair density under single-year and cross-year.
Table 2. Comparison of prediction performance for trichome density under single-year and cross-year.
Figure 2. Phenotypic variability observed for leaf hair (A) and trichomes (B) densities were scored as 0, 1, 2, and 3 from left to right.
Figure 3. Diverging generalization shift from single-year to cross-year prediction: error increases (Δ>0) and accuracy decreases (Δ<0) across models and traits.
